name: real-estate-trifecta

owner.name: Tracy with PorchLyte + Agent Social Haus

description: The Real Estate Trifecta: three skills for the three highest-stakes moments in an agent's business. Buyer Consultation, Listing Presentation, and Closing Day. Works best with the AI Agent Foundation installed. Install once, update automatically.

plugins.name: real-estate-trifecta
plugins.description: The Real Estate Trifecta: three skills for the three highest-stakes moments in an agent's business. Buyer Consultation (win the buyer meeting), Listing Presentation (win the listing), and Closing Day (accepted offer to keys, and the follow-up after). Works best with the AI Agent Foundation plugin installed first.
